CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-27-2007 Continued To Jan-18-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-27-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Patricia Abalos.
Atty. Robert Scott Kennard, Esq. for Plaintiff: DAIMLERCHRYSLER FINANCIAL SERVICES AMERICA LLC.
Plaintiff's Witness: Chuck Kirby was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: CHARLIE WALKER as follows:
Damages $ 39,689.10
Prejudgment Interest - 5,108.90
Attorney's Fees - $2,825
Costs $455.00, for a total of $ 48,078.00
Judgment signed in open court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-23-2007 Continued To Nov-27-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: K. Farnsworth.
Mark Goossen, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Daimlerchrysler Finalcial Services Americas LLC.
At counsel's request in open court, matter is continued to Nov. 27, 2007 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218, for an appearance by the Plaintiff's Witness.
